en: Out there in the hollow. Gigantic hound.
Um... Look, Sherlock. We have to be rational about this, okay?
And you, of all people, can't just...
Let's just stick to what we know, yes? Stick to the facts.
Once you've ruled out the impossible, whatever remains, however improbable, must be true.
ko: 그냥. 불가능한 것을 배제한 후 남은 것, 아무리 불확실해도, 진실이어야 한다고 했지?

en: Look at me. I'm afraid, John. Afraid.
Sherlock. I'll always be able to keep myself distant.
Divorce myself from feelings. But look, you see?
Body's betraying me. Interesting, yes? Emotions.
